topic.title: Introduction to SAP S/4HANA Transportation Management

learningObjectives.title: Understand SAP TM
learningObjectives.description: Explain the role of SAP TM in SAP S/4HANA logistics.

learningObjectives.title: Identify key capabilities
learningObjectives.description: Recognize planning, execution, tracking and settlement capabilities.

learningObjectives.title: Explain integration
learningObjectives.description: Describe SAP TM integration with SD, MM, EWM and FI.

sections.title: Introduction to SAP Transportation Management (SAP TM)

sections.content: SAP Transportation Management (SAP TM) is an advanced logistics solution within SAP S/4HANA that helps organizations plan, optimize, execute, monitor and settle transportation activities. It enables companies to reduce logistics costs, improve service levels, optimize vehicle utilization and gain end-to-end visibility across transportation operations.

sections.title: Definition
sections.content: SAP TM is the central application responsible for transportation planning, carrier collaboration, freight execution, tracking and freight settlement.

items: Integrate with warehouse and ERP systems

sections.content: ABC Electronics ships products from three manufacturing plants to customers across India. Manual planning resulted in partially loaded trucks, delayed deliveries and high freight costs. After implementing SAP TM, shipments were automatically consolidated, optimal carriers were selected and transportation costs were significantly reduced.

sections.title: Real Project Example
sections.content: A global FMCG company implemented SAP TM to consolidate outbound deliveries from multiple plants. Vehicle utilization increased by 23%, transportation costs reduced by 18% and shipment visibility improved significantly.

sections.title: Interview Tip
sections.content: When asked 'Why SAP TM?', answer with business benefits such as transportation optimization, carrier selection, freight cost reduction, shipment visibility and end-to-end logistics integration instead of simply saying it is used for transportation.

sections.title: Common Mistake
sections.content: Do not confuse SAP TM with SAP EWM. SAP TM manages transportation planning and execution, while SAP EWM manages warehouse operations.

items: SAP TM manages transportation planning and execution.
It integrates with SD, MM, EWM and FI.
SAP TM optimizes freight cost and vehicle utilization.
It provides shipment visibility and freight settlement.
SAP TM is a core logistics solution within SAP S/4HANA.
